Privacy Policy

Effective date: April 4, 2026

This policy explains what data Souschef collects, why, and what happens with it. The short version: we collect what we need to make the app work, we don't sell your data, and we don't run ads.

Who We Are

Souschef is made by Aletheia LLC, based in Tucker, Georgia. You can reach us at support@aletheia-apps.com.

What We Collect

Account information

  • Email address — required for authentication (magic link or Google Sign-In)
  • Display name — optional, shown to household members

App data you create

  • Meal plans and recipes
  • Grocery lists
  • Product ratings (thumbs up/down)
  • Notes on meals and grocery items
  • Purchase history from receipt scanning

Kroger integration

  • OAuth tokens — encrypted and stored so we can search products and place orders on your behalf. We never see your Kroger password.

Receipt images

  • When you scan a receipt, the image is sent to Anthropic's Claude API for text extraction. We use it to match items to your grocery list, then discard it. We don't store receipt images long-term.

Price data (opt-in)

  • If you enable price tracking, we log product prices from your searches and receipts to show you trends over time.
  • If you also opt in to anonymous price sharing, we contribute your price data (product and price only, no identity) to a community dataset that helps all users see better price information.

What We Don't Collect

  • No tracking cookies — we use a single session cookie for authentication
  • No analytics or tracking scripts
  • No advertising identifiers
  • No location data

How We Use Your Data

Your data is used to make Souschef work for you:

  • Generating meal plans and grocery lists
  • Searching and ordering products through Kroger
  • Parsing receipts to match purchases
  • Showing you product ratings and price history
  • Improving suggestions based on your preferences

Third-Party Services

We use these services to run the app:

ServicePurposeData shared
Kroger APIProduct search and orderingSearch queries, cart contents (via your Kroger account)
Google Sign-InAuthenticationEmail address only
ResendMagic link emailsYour email address
Anthropic ClaudeReceipt parsingReceipt images for OCR (not stored by Anthropic)
Open Food FactsNutrition scoresProduct lookups (public database)
RailwayHostingAll app data (hosted infrastructure)

None of these services receive your data for advertising purposes.

We Don't Sell Your Data

Period. We don't sell, rent, or trade your personal information to anyone. We don't run ads. Our business model is a subscription fee — you're the customer, not the product.

Household Sharing

If you're invited to a household, you share meal plans, grocery lists, and related data with the household owner and other members. The household owner's account holds the shared data. If you leave a household, your access to that shared data ends.

Data Security

We take reasonable steps to protect your data:

  • Kroger tokens are encrypted at rest
  • Authentication uses short-lived magic links (15 minutes) or Google's OAuth
  • Database access is restricted and connection-pooled
  • API endpoints are rate-limited

No system is perfectly secure. We do our best.

Data Retention

  • Account data — kept as long as your account exists
  • Meal plans — kept indefinitely (your recipe history)
  • Grocery items — checked-off items pruned after 3 days
  • Receipt images — not stored after processing
  • Price data — raw data retained up to 90 days; community aggregates kept longer

Your Rights

You can:

  • Access your data — everything you've entered is visible in the app
  • Delete your account — email support@aletheia-apps.com and we'll delete your account and data within 30 days
  • Disconnect Kroger — revoke access from the Account page at any time
  • Opt out of price sharing — toggle off in Account settings

If you're in a jurisdiction with specific data rights (like GDPR or CCPA), email us and we'll work with you.

Children

Souschef is designed for adults managing their household. We don't knowingly collect data from children under 13.

Changes to This Policy

If we make meaningful changes, we'll notify you in the app. We won't quietly start collecting new data or sharing it with new parties.

Contact

Questions or concerns about your data? Email support@aletheia-apps.com.

Aletheia LLC — Tucker, Georgia
